response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and diverse technical experience, this role requires several non-negotiable qualifications that are absent from the resume: native-level Japanese proficiency (explicitly required), strong C programming expertise for embedded UNIX systems, and specialized knowledge in embedded security and networking technologies. The candidate's background is primarily in web, mobile, and general backend development with minimal exposure to embedded systems, security protocols, or Linux kernel internals—core responsibilities of this position.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps infrastructure experience across multiple organizations
Demonstrated ability to work with low-level systems (robotic arms, DLang systems programming) and learn diverse technical stacks rapidly
Strong open-source contributions and mentoring background showing ability to navigate complex technical domains
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency listed despite being an explicit required qualification for the role
Limited evidence of deep C programming expertise or Linux kernel-level systems work; primary experience in TypeScript/JavaScript web development
No demonstrated background in embedded security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), network protocols (NETCONF, SNMP), or networking stack development

key_factors.factor: Weak C and embedded systems background vs. web development focus
No security or networking domain experience
